title: When the Party's Over
album: WHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?
why_this_song: When the Party's Over by Billie Eilish (2018) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Quiet when I'm coming home"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Quiet when I'm coming home"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Quiet when I'm coming home"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Call me friend, but keep me closer"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Don't you know I'm no good for you?"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I could lie, say I like it like that, like it like that
Don't you know I'm no good for you?
I've learned to lose, you can't afford to
Tore my shirt to stop you bleeding
But nothin' ever stops you leaving

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "quiet" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "quiet" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "coming" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Don't you know I'm no good for you?
Don't you know too much already?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "When the Party's Over" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "When the Party's Over", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "When the Party's Over" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "When the Party's Over" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "When the Party's Over", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "When the Party's Over", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
